# CMFormatDescription.Extensions.Value.CameraCalibrationDataLensCollection.AlgorithmKind

**Enumeration**

Specifies the camera calibration methodology.

## Declaration

```swift
enum AlgorithmKind
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **CMFormatDescription.Extensions.Value.CameraCalibrationDataLensCollection.AlgorithmKind.parametric**: The camera lens calibration requires camera intrinsic and extrinsic parameters.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
